title: Business Analyst I
description: Accenture is hiring a Business Analyst I to support client engagements remotely. You'll gather requirements, analyze business processes, and recommend improvements. This role offers exposure to diverse industries and the opportunity to develop consulting skills.
responsibilities: Gather and document client business requirements; conduct interviews and workshops
Analyze current business processes; identify inefficiencies and improvement opportunities
Prepare requirements documentation and process flow diagrams for development teams
Support solution design and implementation; communicate status to stakeholders
Track project metrics and prepare reports on project progress and outcomes

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Information Systems, or related field
